Read a GMT (Gene Matrix Transposed) file

Source: R/compute_module_score.R
read_gmt.Rd

Parse a GMT (Gene Matrix Transposed) file and return gene sets as a named list. Each element contains the gene symbols belonging to that pathway.

Usage

read_gmt(path)

Arguments

path

Path to the GMT file.

Value

A named list of character vectors (pathway name → gene symbols).

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
gmt <- read_gmt("h.all.v2022.1.Hs.symbols.gmt")
names(gmt)[1:5]
} # }
